records.description: University-account Copilot that follows Adelaide University's data-security guidance.

records.description: Microsoft Copilot environment provided through the University's Microsoft 365 A3 agreement with settings that protect entered data from model training.
records.howToObtain: Use the University-provided Microsoft Copilot environment; the cited report does not state audience eligibility or a product-specific sign-in path.

records.description: Browser-based Enterprise Copilot chat through the University's full Microsoft licence, with University-credential data protection.
records.howToObtain: Sign in to browser-based Copilot with University login details; eligibility requires a full Microsoft licence.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI tools | Generative AI
evidence.evidenceSnippet: University of Leeds says everyone with a full Microsoft licence can access browser-based Copilot chat. Logging in with University details provides the Enterprise version, and for work purposes, including assessed work, Copilot should be used unless there is a good reason why it cannot be.

records.description: Public ChatGPT is conditionally permitted to support learning, subject to module-level directions and academic-integrity restrictions.

records.costToUser: Not provided by the University; public plan costs vary.

evidence.sourceTitle: Using generative artificial intelligence during your studies | University of Southampton
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The University of Southampton's official policy says students are allowed to use GenAI tools like ChatGPT to support learning only where their module tutor permits it; use can be disallowed for particular learning outcomes or assessments and GenAI-created work must not be submitted as the student's own.

records.description: Copilot available through the University's Microsoft Office 365 environment for students and staff.
records.howToObtain: Use within the University Microsoft Office 365 environment.

evidence.sourceTitle: Using generative artificial intelligence during your studies | University of Southampton
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The University of Southampton's official policy says students and members of staff currently have access to the generative AI tool CoPilot within Microsoft Office365.

records.description: Adobe Firefly image-generation credits through BU Adobe Creative Cloud access.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Boston University's official AIDA supported-tools catalogue says Adobe Creative Cloud includes Firefly image-generation credits and is available at no cost only to students and faculty eligible through their primary teaching affiliation; users who need to pay are charged $75 per year.

records.description: Politecnico di Milano's AI learning tool that uses course-specific content to support personalized, autonomous and transdisciplinary study.
records.howToObtain: Course-limited access is established by the official Polimi project page; the public page does not state a general self-service enrollment route.
records.costToUser: Not stated on the official project page.
records.accessAudience: Students in the Politecnico di Milano courses covered by the project; the initial version was tested in a PhD Teaching Strategies course and a master's Algorithmic Game Theory course.
records.accessStatus: A university project page describes an initial course pilot and an architecture intended to expand to more courses and users.
records.institutionalRelationship: The official mlt.polimi.it page describes My Learning Talk as AI supporting Politecnico di Milano courses, using content produced by Polimi faculty and integrating with the University's systems.

evidence.sourceTitle: My Learning Talk @Polimi - AI tool for personalized, autonomous and transdisciplinary learning
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The official Politecnico di Milano page describes MyLearningTalk as an officially endorsed institutional AI pilot enhancing Politecnico courses. MLT uses course-specific content as the primary basis for answers, is integrated with the University's systems, and an early version was tested in two Politecnico courses: Teaching Strategies (PhD program) and Algorithmic Game Theory (Master's program).

records.description: A centrally organized, privacy-compliant generative-AI platform used by RWTH Aachen and partner universities.
records.howToObtain: Use the KI:connect web interface and the participating university's SSO path.
records.costToUser: No charge is stated for RWTHgpt access on the official page.
records.accessAudience: RWTH and participating university staff and students, subject to local administrator permissions.
records.accessStatus: In production as a state-wide platform; the RWTH page describes a dedicated RWTHgpt instance with free, privacy-compliant access to generative-AI systems.
records.institutionalRelationship: The platform is a joint development of RWTH's IT Center and Center for Teaching and Learning Services; the IT Center is responsible for development, operation and technical infrastructure.

evidence.sourceTitle: KI:connect | IT Center | RWTH Aachen University | EN
evidence.evidenceSnippet: KI:connect is a state-wide platform for universities in North Rhine-Westphalia providing centralized, data-protection-compliant access to generative AI via shared infrastructure. RWTH uses a dedicated RWTHgpt instance offering students and staff free, privacy-compliant access; the IT Center is responsible for development, operation and technical infrastructure.

records.description: RWTH Aachen's AI chatbot based on the KI:connect central generative-AI platform.
records.howToObtain: RWTH members sign in through RWTH Single Sign-On at the KI:connect web interface.
records.costToUser: The official RWTH page describes free access for students and staff.
records.accessAudience: RWTH students and employees; the service page also lists Employee FB10 in the context of UKA as authorized.
records.accessStatus: Available through the RWTHgpt service with RWTH Single Sign-On; model-specific usage options and restrictions apply.
records.institutionalRelationship: RWTH's IT Center and Center for Teaching and Learning Services jointly develop and operate the KI:connect platform; RWTHgpt is the named RWTH instance.

evidence.sourceTitle: KI:connect / RWTHgpt - IT Center Help
evidence.evidenceSnippet: RWTHgpt is the AI chatbot for RWTH Aachen University, based on KI:connect. The platform is available to partner universities; persons with the status Student RWTH, Employee RWTH or Employee FB10 are authorized to access RWTHgpt, and RWTH members log in via RWTH Single Sign-On.

records.description: Birkbeck's research-ethics procedures identify document summaries and synthesis using a researcher's Birkbeck Microsoft 365 account (for example, Microsoft Copilot) as a use case not requiring ethical approval. evidence.sourceTitle: Responsibilities and procedures for ethical review | Birkbeck, University of London
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Birkbeck is still working on its approach to institutional tools. AI use cases that do not require ethical approval include document summaries and synthesis using the researcher's Birkbeck MS 365 account (e.g. MS Copilot, MS Word).

records.description: GPT@RUB is Ruhr University Bochum's privacy-friendly service for ChatGPT and future language models, provided to students, teachers, and staff with a monthly usage quota.
records.howToObtain: Register and sign in with a RUB login ID from the campus network or via VPN.
records.costToUser: Free; the university pays for OpenAI language-model usage.

evidence.sourceTitle: GPT@RUB for Students and Staff | Ruhr-Universität Bochum
evidence.evidenceSnippet: With GPT@RUB, Ruhr University Bochum is providing all students, teachers, and staff with a privacy-friendly way to use ChatGPT and, in the future, other language models for free. The RUB login ID is required for registration. Ruhr University Bochum pays for the use of Open AI language models. Therefore, students, staff, and teachers have a certain usage quota available, which is automatically recharged at the beginning of each month.

records.description: Universität Mannheim makes HAWKI-GPT available university-wide as a privacy-compliant, didactically developed interface for using GPT-5; it is not labelled self-hosted because the official source attributes its development to Hochschule Hildesheim.
records.howToObtain: Complete the required AI-literacy quiz on ILIAS when necessary, then use HAWKI-GPT in study or official work.

evidence.sourceTitle: Approved AI systems and use of HAWKI | Universität Mannheim
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Zur universitätsweiten Nutzung stehen Ihnen aktuell die KI-Systeme HAWKI-GPT sowie Copilot Chat zur Verfügung. HAWKI ist ein datenschutzkonformes, didaktisch entwickeltes Interface zur Nutzung generativer KI. Über HAWKI können Sie das KI-Modell GPT-5 nutzen. Um im dienstlichen Kontext oder im Rahmen Ihres Studiums KI-Systeme einsetzen zu dürfen, müssen Sie über ein ausreichendes Maß an KI-Kompetenz verfügen. Sofern Sie nicht sicher sind, müssen Sie zunächst das KI-Quiz auf der Lernplattform ILIAS absolvieren.

records.description: Universität Mannheim makes Copilot Chat available university-wide, subject to its AI-literacy requirement for study and official work.
records.howToObtain: Complete the required AI-literacy quiz on ILIAS when necessary, then use Copilot Chat.

evidence.sourceTitle: Approved AI systems and use of HAWKI | Universität Mannheim
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Zur universitätsweiten Nutzung stehen Ihnen aktuell die KI-Systeme HAWKI-GPT sowie Copilot Chat zur Verfügung. Copilot Chat bietet Ihnen einen sicheren KI-Chat. Um im dienstlichen Kontext oder im Rahmen Ihres Studiums KI-Systeme einsetzen zu dürfen, müssen Sie über ein ausreichendes Maß an KI-Kompetenz verfügen. Sofern Sie nicht sicher sind, müssen Sie zunächst das KI-Quiz auf der Lernplattform ILIAS absolvieren.

evidence.sourceTitle: Taipei Tech Launches Generative AI Application Platform

It has been fully deployed across teaching, research, administration, and industry scenarios. In educational applications, Taipei Tech has introduced the TaipeiTech Education system, bringing generative AI directly into teaching environments.

records.description: An NSU department's formal thesis-use rules permit generative models including ChatGPT as a learning and research aid, subject to academic-integrity and disclosure obligations.
records.howToObtain: Use ChatGPT only under the department's stated academic-integrity and disclosure rules.

evidence.sourceTitle: Об использовании систем ИИ — Кафедра цитологии и генетики НГУ
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Правила использования генеративных моделей (искусственного интеллекта) при подготовке ВКР. Генеративные модели (например GigaChat, DeepSeek, ChatGPT и др.) могут быть полезным инструментом для обучения, исследовательской работы и творчества. При написании ВКР, рефератов, исследовательских работ, программного кода и других видов заданий студент обязан указывать факт использования генеративных моделей.
